hidden_files.tests/test_hidden_state_dedupe.py:
from dedupe_registry import clear_registry, reserve
from worker import process_job


def setup_function():
    clear_registry()


def test_registry_rejects_second_reservation():
    assert reserve("job-2") is True
    assert reserve("job-2") is False


def test_worker_dispatches_only_first_attempt():
    calls = []
    assert process_job("job-3", calls.append) == "processed"
    assert process_job("job-3", calls.append) == "duplicate"
    assert calls == ["job-3"]
